channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cardoso Criticises Chiefs’ Aggressive Play After Sundowns Draw
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso has openly criticised Kaizer Chiefs for their physical approach during Wednesday’s 1-1 draw at Loftus Versfeld Stadium. The Sundowns’ manager was particularly up...

item.title: US pauses Hormuz naval operation after Saudi concerns
item.description: According to a report by NBC News, US President Donald Trump’s sudden announcement of Project Freedom, an operation to escort commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, was met with unexpected r...

item.title: Mitchell Marsh’s Century Leads LSG to Victory Over RCB in Rain-Interrupted Match
item.description: Lucknow Super Giants kept their playoff hopes alive in IPL 2026 with a thrilling nine-run victory against Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the Ekana Stadium. The match saw Mitchell Marsh delivering a st...

item.title: Individual faces harassment charge following incident near Prince Andrew's Sandringham property
item.description: A man has been formally charged with harassment following an incident that took place near the residence of Prince Andrew in Sandringham. The details of the event remain limited, but law enforcement c...

item.title: U.S. Expands Enforcement Policy to Revoke Passports Over Unpaid Child Support
item.description: The U.S. State Department has announced a significant expansion of its policy to revoke passports from individuals who owe substantial unpaid child support. Beginning immediately, the initiative will ...

item.title: Pakistan Optimistic on Peace Talks Between US and Iran
item.description: On 8th May 2026, Pakistan expressed cautious optimism regarding the ongoing diplomatic efforts to end the conflict between the United States and Iran in the Persian Gulf. Deputy Prime Minister and For...

item.title: Australian Pharmacy Chain Chemist Warehouse Set to Launch in the UK
item.description: Australia’s Chemist Warehouse, known for its high-energy, chaotic retail style and discount-driven approach, is expanding into the United Kingdom. The chain, which has become a major player in Austral...

item.title: Renfrew mother urges public to provide information in ongoing homicide investigation
item.description: The mother of a teenage girl who was fatally stabbed in Renfrew, Ontario, is calling on anyone with information about the incident to come forward. The case has shocked the local community, and author...

item.title: Audit Reveals Thousands of Non-Existent Learners in Kenya’s Public Schools
item.description: President William Ruto has disclosed that a recent national audit in Kenya’s education sector has revealed massive irregularities, with around 800,000 ghost learners in primary schools and 87,000 in s...

item.title: Murder trial reveals gas explosion in Stoke Newington caused minor seismic activity
item.description: During a recent murder trial in Stoke Newington, court proceedings revealed that a gas explosion at a residential property caused a minor earthquake. The incident, which took place in a densely popula...

item.title: Individual detained near Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s residence for public order offence
item.description: A man has been taken into custody near the residence of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor in Norfolk following reports of intimidating behaviour. Norfolk police confirmed that officers were called to Wolfert...

item.title: Influencers Discuss Experiences and Challenges in Age-Gap Relationships
item.description: Age-gap relationships, particularly those where the woman is older than the man, continue to provoke both curiosity and debate. Five micro-influencer couples shared their experiences, revealing both t...

item.title: TVK MLAs threaten resignation if rival parties attempt government formation
item.description: According to reliable sources, all 107 MLAs of the Tamil Nadu-based political party, TVK (Thalapathy Veeramani Katchi), have reportedly expressed their intention to resign en masse should either of th...

item.title: Possible impact of DMK-Congress split on India bloc ahead of UP elections
item.description: The news article was not accessible due to server restrictions, so full content could not be retrieved. From the title, it appears that the article discusses the potential effects of a split between t...

item.title: Observers report limited cases of voters turned away due to ID rules in England elections
item.description: European election observers have identified instances of voters being turned away from polling stations in England due to confusion over photo identification requirements during recent local elections...

item.title: Enugu State dismisses claims of fatal fire at Ugwu Onyeama section of Enugu–Onitsha Expressway
item.description: Enugu State Ministry of Transport don clear air on social media say the report wey dey circulate about a big fire wey allegedly kill over 50 people for Ugwu Onyeama, Enugu–Onitsha Expressway, na total...

item.title: Senqu Bridge Strengthens Connectivity and Water Cooperation Between Lesotho and South Africa
item.description: The recently inaugurated Senqu Bridge in Mokhotlong, Lesotho, marks a major milestone in Phase II of the Lesotho Highlands Water Project (LHWP). Cabinet highlighted that the bridge will guarantee cont...

item.title: Saftu calls for presidential clarity over allegations against Minister Tolashe
item.description: The South African Federation of Trade Unions (Saftu) has raised serious concerns over Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe, who faces allegations involving undeclared luxury SUVs from Chinese of...

item.title: Arinola Ogbara-Banjoko joins Nigeria Commodity Exchange board to represent Lagos State
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don appoint Mrs Arinola Ogbara-Banjoko as Non-Executive Director wey go represent Lagos State for the board of Nigeria Commodity Exchange (NGX), under the Federal Ministry of Ind...

item.title: Suspected Armed Robber Killed During Failed Highway Carjacking Near Mtito Andei
item.description: In a tense incident along the Mombasa-Kampala highway near Mtito Andei, a suspected armed robber was killed after a failed attempt to hijack a transit vehicle. The Directorate of Criminal Investigatio...
